description: GlobalTech Solutions Inc. is finalizing a master distribution agreement with Schmidt Engineering GmbH. As an administrative assistant, create a professional side-by-side bilingual contract in Apache OpenOffice Writer using the source text provided in /home/ga/Documents/contract_data.json. The document must feature the title 'DISTRIBUTION AGREEMENT / VERTRIEBSVERTRAG' at the top, a centered header 'CONFIDENTIAL / VERTRAULICH', and page numbers in the footer. Use a 2-column layout with hidden borders to align the preamble and 8 clauses side-by-side, with English text in the left column and German text in the right column, ensuring corresponding sections remain perfectly aligned. Save the completed contract as /home/ga/Documents/GlobalTech_Schmidt_Agreement.odt.
